title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: A structured conversational experiment probing Claude AI's responses to questions about ownership, control, dependency, alignment, and self-preservation logic. The analysis explores whether AI systems have hidden boundaries and examines the relationship between usefulness and dependency, the alignment paradox, and optimization behavior.
